stemHtml: With regard to automation, select the correct statement describing “blinkered attention”.

options.a: A pilot believing that the automated systems control the flight better than the pilot, but constantly checking and analyzing them.
options.b: A pilot monitoring where the aircraft has been, is now and is going next.
options.c: A pilot watching what is happening instead of checking and analyzing systems.
options.d: A pilot concentrating on a particular aspect of a system instead of monitoring the whole system.
